message:
chore(beads): record numpy reality-check epic and mock-audit findings

Flush .beads/issues.jsonl after today's reality-check + mock-code-finder
skill runs so the JSONL source of truth matches the SQLite store.

Status transitions:
- franken_numpy-c8lw (numpy.logspace python wrapper parity) →
  in_progress → closed. Landed earlier today in br-franken_numpy-c8lw.

New issues filed from audit_numpy_reality.md and audit_numpy_mocks.md:

- franken_numpy-vhd5 (P1, docs): reality-check gap — fnp_python exposes
  43.3% of numpy.__all__ vs the README "full API" claim. Lays out
  surface gap (70 ufuncs, 106 functions, 21 classes, 50 dtype scalars,
  16 submodules, 6 constants, 2 dunders, 12 indexing objects) plus a
  strategic fork between "close the gap" and "pivot the claim".

- franken_numpy-k74v (P1, epic): "Close fnp_python passthrough gap for
  numpy.__all__ (~200 wrappers)". Parent for the per-category work.
  Split into 7 child beads:
    .1 70 core ufunc passthroughs (where this commit's ten land)
    .2 ~100 core function passthroughs (reductions, creation, etc.)
    .3 21 numpy class passthroughs (errstate, finfo, memmap, ...)
    .4 50 dtype scalar re-exports (int8..int64, float32/64, ...)
    .5 submodule namespace strategy decision (flat vs nested)
    .6 expose numpy constants (pi, e, nan, inf, euler_gamma, ...)
    .7 expose __version__ via env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION")

- franken_numpy-4e84 (P4, docs): mock-code-finder result log. Confirms
  zero stubs/mocks/TODOs across fnp-dtype, fnp-ndarray, fnp-iter,
  fnp-ufunc, fnp-linalg, fnp-random, fnp-io, fnp-runtime,
  fnp-conformance, fnp-python — only cosmetic unwraps remain.

- franken_numpy-5hef (P3): cosmetic upgrade of a single guarded unwrap
  in fnp-ufunc einsum (line 17893) to expect() with context.

- franken_numpy-7qp9 (P3): upgrade 42 fixture-builder unwraps in
  fnp-conformance to expect() with context (25 in lib.rs, 17 in
  dump_expected.rs).

No code changes in this commit; just makes the issue graph match the
work actually sitting in main.
